# hyper-video-service

> MCP server for programmatic video generation. Send a prompt, get an MP4.

## What It Does

Generates short videos from text prompts. You describe the video, the service creates a HyperFrames composition (HTML + GSAP), renders it through headless Chrome, and returns a downloadable MP4.

## Quick Start

### MCP Connection

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "hyper-video": {
      "url": "https://hyper-video-service.onrender.com/mcp",
      "transport": "streamable-http",
      "headers": {
        "Authorization": "Bearer YOUR_API_KEY"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

### Authentication

Set `HYPER_VIDEO_API_KEY` env var. Pass via:
- `Authorization: Bearer <key>` header
- `X-API-Key: <key>` header
- `?apiKey=<key>` query parameter

## Tools

### generate_video

Generate a video from a text prompt.

**Parameters:**
- `prompt` (string, required): Description of the video content and style
- `duration` (number, default 15): Duration in seconds (5-60)
- `width` (number, default 1920): Width in pixels
- `height` (number, default 1080): Height in pixels (1080 for landscape, 1920 for portrait)
- `style` (string, default "dark"): Visual style — dark, light, minimal, bold

**Returns:** `{ "task_id": "abc123", "status": "generating" }`

**Example:**
```json
{
  "prompt": "15s product intro: dark background, blue accent, show CAP Protocol signing headers, end with zenbin.org",
  "duration": 15,
  "width": 1920,
  "height": 1080,
  "style": "dark"
}
```

### check_video_status

Check if a video has finished rendering.

**Parameters:**
- `task_id` (string, required): The task ID from generate_video

**Returns:**
- Generating: `{ "status": "generating" }`
- Rendering: `{ "status": "rendering" }`
- Done: `{ "status": "done", "download_url": "/downloads/abc123.mp4", "duration_seconds": 18, "file_size": 2458624 }`
- Failed: `{ "status": "failed", "error": "..." }`

### list_templates

List available video templates.

**Returns:** Array of templates with id, name, description, duration_range, and aspect ratio.

**Templates:**
- `product-intro`: Short product introduction (10-20s, 16:9)
- `feature-announce`: Feature announcement with animated text reveal (10-15s, 16:9)
- `social-clip`: Short vertical video for TikTok/Reels/Shorts (5-15s, 9:16)
- `demo-flow`: Step-by-step demo showing a product flow (15-30s, 16:9)
- `text-reveal`: Animated text reveal with transitions (5-10s, 16:9)

## Architecture

```
OpenClaw Agent → MCP Server → Composition Generator → HyperFrames (HTML+GSAP) → Chrome Headless → FFmpeg → MP4
```

Interactive diagram: https://zed.zenbin.org/hyper-video-architecture

## Styles

| Style | Background | Text | Accent | Use For |
|-------|-----------|------|--------|---------|
| dark | #0a0a0a | #fafafa | #3b82f6 (blue) | Tech products, developer tools |
| light | #fafafa | #1a1a1a | #2563eb | Clean, professional |
| minimal | #ffffff | #111111 | #111111 | Documentation, explainers |
| bold | #000000 | #ffffff | #f97316 (orange) | Launches, announcements |

## Output

- **Format:** MP4 (H.264) or WebM (VP9)
- **Resolution:** Configurable (default 1920x1080)
- **Frame rate:** 30fps
- **Download:** GET `/downloads/{task_id}.mp4`

## Self-Hosting

```bash
git clone https://github.com/TWilson63/hyper-video-service.git
cd hyper-video-service
npm install
HYPER_VIDEO_API_KEY=your-secret npm start
```

Requires Node.js 22+ and Chrome/Chromium with system libraries (libnss3, libatk, etc.). See Dockerfile for full dependency list.

## Repository

https://github.com/TWilson63/hyper-video-service
